description: Small fragment of a letter. The upper left corner of recto is preserved, with blessings for the addressee's two sons. On verso there is a remnant of the address in Arabic script but with no names: الحضرة السامية الاجلية ال . . . . . .مجدها وضاعف سعدها
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
